▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 30 2001 at 9:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this item is NOT..I repeat NOT a monk item. Anyone that thinks it is is a ****** ****** end of story.
ENCHANTER/MONK WARS
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2001 at 8:00 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592248801112
36 posts
Along time ago, in a galaxy far far away...
Enchanter/Monk Wars...

Enchanter: This goes to enchanters. We hit pounded by monsters and no one even looks at us. We get only get 12 AC from our items!

Monk: THIS IS MONK ITEM. YOU ARE INTRUDING ON MONK TERRITORY. I CLAIM THIS ITEM FOR MONKS. ITS MONKS ONLY NOW STAY AWAY. WE NEVER GET ANYTHING!!! OUR MAIN USE IS TO FLING OURSELVES INTO A MOB AND HAVE OUR PARTY MEMBERS ENJOY THE SIGHT OF US BEING USED AS A TOOTHPICK! BTW, MONKS SHOULD ALSO HAVE THE WARLORD BP, VALORIUM, TOLAN DARKWOOD, RAGEBRINGERS, FIERY DEFENDERS, and JAGGED SWORDS OF WAR. MONKS SHOULD ALSO RULE NORRATH.

Enchanter: I get battered everyday! I must have this! We could actually survive! You monks have AC Bonuses! Here, have this leather armor. See, all good! Now dont complain about your AC. Its better than most warrior's AC.

Monk: THIS SUCKS! LEATHER? I WANT CHAIN! PLATE! ADAMANTIUM, MITHRIL! I MUST HAVE EVERY RARE DROP THAT DROPS IN THIS GAME! EVERYTHING SHOULD BE MONK ONLY! IF YOU LET ME HAVE THIS, TOGETHER WE COULD RULE THE GALAXY AS FATHER AND SON!

Enchanter: ***** you.
Monk: Bite me.
Enchanter: Ill duel you on Tallon.
Monk: First Ill own you! THEN THE WORLD! MUHAHAHHA.

Enchanter: You monks should be herded into a corner and throughly annihialated by use of...The Skeletal Warlord!!!

Monk: NO!!! NOT THE MOB THAT DROPS TRANQUIL STAVES! YOU EVIL CRACK DEALER!!!!

Enchanter: THEN YOU SHOULD BE FORCED TO WEAR 20.0 WEIGHT EQUIPMENT!!!

Monk: No! Forget about Tallon! Ill kill you now!!!

Enchanter: How? We are talking in a message board.

Monk: SEE, NO ONE APPRECIATES US. THEY THINK WE CANT DO ANYTHING EXCEPT PLAY DEAD. I WILL HARASS VERANT UNTIL THEY GIVE US MONKS PSIONIC POWERS SO I CAN SMACK YOU DOWN! THEN I WILL HARASS THEM UNTIL THEY GIVE US AK47 RIFLES!!!

Enchanter: Splintered clubs arent good for ya, eh? Stay put where you are and let us Enchanters get the Uzis. We should have better melee.

Monk: Fook you!
Enchanter: How dare you talk to me that way, you ignorant filth! Isnt it past your bedtime.

Monk: OMG! Your right! It is! Mommy....!
Enchanter: Now I can rule Norrath by harassing Verant. Muhahhah.
Enchanter: Eh? Whats that?
Shadowknight: You know too much. Now you must die.
Enchanter: What?! Huh?

The Shadowknight reverse kites him into a shardwurm where he is horribly digested.

In conclusion, if the item says ALL/ALL, it means everybody. BTW, SK RULE!!!
▲ Page top
RE: ENCHANTER/MONK WARS
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 11:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768435223
20 posts
ROFLMAO....that had to be the funniest post ive ever seen on this damn site....i must say i love both monks and enchanters, but they are the b*tchiest classes in the game....i just b*tch that i dont have dual wield

This is what you said.
Enchanter: This goes to enchanters. We hit pounded by monsters and no one even looks at us. We get only get 12 AC from our items

The reality: Rangers(the good ones) are always watchin life bars of casters and clerics and peeling the mobs off(til an enchanter can mes). And yes, this would be a good item for enchanters, as well as any class that doesn't need to be light, ahem.....monks. =)

__DEL__1616372496772

Veeshan Server
▲ Page top
Good for all classes.
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 12:37 PM Rating: Default
ParadiseLost
Scholar
151 posts
This is a good item for anyone period. Saying it's just good for one class or another is stupid. Also anyone who really plays and understands the game knows that ac don't mean a whole lot to any casters in the high end game. their ac sucks and will always suck period. Adding 15 ac to some slot (assuming their current item is already 5ish ac) will amount to MAYBE 10 points dmg absorbtion. WOOT! Instead of that mob smacking you for 270 he hit for 260. =P Ac doesn't mean squat for ae (the majority of dmg most casters take), resists do. When you get summoned the best you can hope for is you get mem blur off and/or the tank taunts off. The stats and resists are what make this item great for anyone only prob is the weight could hurt alot of the casters out there. The only class this is pretty much useless to is a monk but there again it would depend on the monk, my monk is slighty over his weight limit yet has higher ac then if I had lower weight (and thus ac) items. And before you dance in here with your lvl 16 wizard and say you get smacked around in melee all the time remember that this is from ToV. You won't see this unless your 55+ and at that point you are taking alot of dmg in melee unless you're summoned or the tanks are dead in which it's time to all die or call evac.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 08 2001 at 12:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 04 2001 at 12:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) wt19.4!!!!! omg that is some heavy stuff....but well worth it.

# May 10 2001 at 1:17 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Some of you ppl, should really dial up your nearest surgical clinic and get an appointment to get that stick removed from your ***. I dont know how many posts I've read with the arrogant *** calling the ignorant poster and Idiot,Moron etc etc. Woopy ding someone comes on here not knowing all the details. Aside from misleading info aleast the person isn't a petulant tyranical SOB's with nothin better to do than drool over EQ related websites and new astounding items released. IF you EQ losers are gettin that POed cause someone is messing up info or stating THEIR OPINION "yes others do have these, yours are not the law" then warm up a cup of milk, pop some sleep pills STFU and go to bed cause obviously your cranky *** HASNT HAD ENOUGH SLEEP!!

Ps: Any replies to this post, that are negative, crude--you know.. just gives me the satisfaction of knowing your the worse thing any living creature could be. Predictable.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 30 2001 at 9:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) yes but your comment was the most predictable out of all of them mister anonymous :)
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 12 2001 at 4:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You gotta love when flamers flame flamers for flaming.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 3:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who is arrogant and who has a stick up their a**? Glass houses fella. As to the person who used the term "moron" below, he was telling said person to lighten up (hint, hint) and his use of a "bad name" was irony. Am I predictable for responding to a post that flames flamers? Yes, i am human afterall. But if you believe the philosophy you espose in your post, then you shall forgive me for expressing my OPINION. If not, then you are a hypocrite (e.g. someone flaming flamers)
